options.command: if command -v supabase >/dev/null 2>&1; then supabase --version; else echo 'supabase CLI not found. Install from https://supabase.com/docs/guides/cli'; fi
command -v supabase >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'supabase CLI not found. Install from https://supabase.com/docs/guides/cli'; exit 1; }; supabase status
command -v supabase >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'supabase CLI not found. Install from https://supabase.com/docs/guides/cli'; exit 1; }; supabase db push
command -v supabase >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'supabase CLI not found. Install from https://supabase.com/docs/guides/cli'; exit 1; }; supabase db reset
